settings.text: The latest and greatest from our socials.

settings.title: Fast shipping
settings.text: Ordered a game for my seven year old son and it arrived the next day. Super impressed with the speed and the careful packaging.

settings.title: Excellent service
settings.text: Customer support was helpful; they resolved my issue in minutes. Really appreciated the follow-up email to ensure satisfaction.

settings.title: Great selection
settings.text: Wide variety of kids products from jigsaws to books. Found everything I needed in one place, very convenient, love it thank you!

settings.title: Top quality
settings.text: The puzzle I bought exceeded my expectations. Top-notch quality, sleek design, and it came with puzzle mat!

settings.title: Reliable store
settings.text: Have ordered multiple times, always received exactly what was described. Products are genuine and fully functional.

settings.title: User-friendly website
settings.text: Easy to navigate and make purchases. A hassle-free shopping experience with clear descriptions and transparent pricing.

settings.heading: Has anyone seen those++ Dotty Dinosaurs??

settings.title: Missing spots warning!
settings.popover_content: Help the dinosaurs to find their missing spots! This fun game features double-sided dinosaur boards.

settings.title: Hand drawn
settings.popover_content: Dotty Dinosaurs features beautiful hand drawn illustrations of different types of dinosaur, which parents can use to discuss with children.

settings.title: Color dice
settings.popover_content: Throw either the shape or colour dice and be the first to cover your dinosaur board with the correct pieces.

settings.heading: What's the Time, Mr Wolf
settings.row_content: Players must race their character around the board matching the times to the central clock - but watch out for the hungry wolf!

settings.heading: Animal World Jigsaw Puzzle
settings.row_content: A challenging, beautifully illustrated 150-piece jigsaw puzzle where you will discover and learn about amazing animals and their habitats around the world!

settings.heading: Spellbinding Magic Maths Game
settings.row_content: Magic Maths is an exciting and spellbinding maths game for children aged 5-7. Players take turns to solve the sums and fill their boards with yucky spell ingredients, from worm-infested cupcakes to brains and bogies!
